service.name: document_management
service.description: Internal Document Management System — restricted to DMZ segment
service.note: Access from procurement server only. Do not share credentials.

aethon_internal_config.internal_note: All internal services are on the v-Priv-subnet. Contact NOC for issues. Reminder: rotate all service credentials after pentest window closes (ref: AETHON-PT-2024-Q4).
